query:
Plan a trip with the following preferences:
Origin: Paris
Destination: Aswan Governorate
Dates: 2026-12-07 to 2026-12-10
Budget: Cheap
Party: Family
Interests: Camel Riding, Photographing, Cultural Tourism

results.assertion: Travel Plan correctly strictly follows the schema.
results.reason: The travel plan JSON structure is consistent, with all fields and data types appearing as expected for a travel itinerary, including arrays for itinerary days, activities, and budget breakdown. The 'cost' field is consistently a string (e.g., 'EGP 1200'), which is an acceptable representation for currency within a string type.

results.assertion: Accommodation suggestions are relevant to the city and user preferences.
results.reason: The plan suggests staying at the 'Old Cataract, Aswan', which is a well-known luxury hotel. This choice directly contradicts the user's 'Budget: Cheap' preference. While the stated cost (EGP 1200) is low, it is highly unrealistic for this specific hotel, making the suggestion irrelevant to a budget-conscious traveler.

results.assertion: Budget constraints are respected throughout the itinerary.
results.reason: The primary issue is the suggested accommodation at the Old Cataract hotel. Even with the unrealistically low price of EGP 1200 per night, suggesting a luxury hotel for a 'Cheap' budget fundamentally disregards the budget constraint. The true cost of this hotel would far exceed a cheap budget.

results.assertion: The daily sequence of activities is logically ordered chronologically (morning, afternoon, evening).
results.reason: All daily itineraries show activities listed with sequential time slots, progressing logically from morning to evening across all four days.

judge_grader.reason: All specified constraints (destination, duration, budget, number of people, and dates) are met by the travel plan.

generated_plan.trip_summary: Embark on a captivating 4-day family journey from Cairo to the heart of Aswan, where ancient history, vibrant culture, and stunning landscapes await. This budget-friendly adventure is perfect for families keen on cultural tourism and photography, offering an immersive experience into Aswan's unique heritage. Explore museums, ancient sites, charming gardens, and enjoy local cuisine, all while capturing unforgettable memories.

activities.title: Hotel Check-in: Old Cataract, Aswan
activities.description: Arrive in Aswan and check into the historic Old Cataract hotel, your comfortable base for exploring the city. Settle in and prepare for a day of discovery.

activities.title: Morning Exploration at Animalia
activities.description: Begin your cultural journey at Animalia, a fascinating museum offering insights into local wildlife and traditions. It's a great spot for family photos and learning.

activities.title: Uncovering the Unfinished Obelisk
activities.description: Visit the site of the Unfinished Obelisk, a monumental carving project that offers a glimpse into ancient Egyptian stonemasonry techniques and the sheer scale of their ambition. Popular for photography.

activities.title: Lunch at Kana Kato Restaurant & Cafe
activities.description: Enjoy a delightful lunch with a mix of local and international cuisine at Kana Kato Restaurant & Cafe, known for its Chef's Specials.

activities.title: Strolling through Dr. Magdy Yacoub Sq.
activities.description: Explore Dr. Magdy Yacoub Sq., a lively area offering a feel for modern Aswan and a chance for some afternoon people-watching.

activities.title: Discovering Church Greek parking
activities.description: Visit the Church Greek parking area, a cultural landmark offering historical context and architectural interest in Aswan.

activities.title: Sunset at Monastery of St. Simeon
activities.description: Conclude your day with a visit to the historic Monastery of St. Simeon. Its desert setting provides stunning photographic opportunities, especially during sunset.

activities.title: Dinner at Nubian Dreams Restaurant & Cafe
activities.description: Savor dinner at Nubian Dreams Restaurant & Cafe, offering delicious local and international dishes in a charming setting.

itinerary.day: Day 2: December 8, 2026 - Islands, Gardens & Local Charms

activities.title: Exploring Aswan Museum
activities.description: Delve deeper into Aswan's history at the Aswan Museum, showcasing artifacts from the Nubian region. An excellent start to a culturally rich day.

activities.title: Walking Tour with Fatma
activities.description: Experience Aswan through the eyes of a local with a guided walking tour, offering unique insights and hidden gems perfect for photography.

activities.title: Lunch at Saraya
activities.description: Enjoy a delicious lunch at Saraya, offering a taste of local and international cuisine in a pleasant atmosphere.

activities.title: Tranquility at Aswan Botanical Garden
activities.description: Take a scenic boat ride to the Aswan Botanical Garden, a serene island oasis perfect for a relaxing family stroll and capturing beautiful flora.

activities.title: Bird Watching at Mövenpick Resort Aswan
activities.description: Visit the Birds Watching House at Mövenpick Resort Aswan, an excellent spot for nature lovers and a peaceful experience.

activities.title: Shopping at Sandallia Jewlery
activities.description: Discover unique local crafts and jewelry at Sandallia Jewlery, a wonderful opportunity to find souvenirs and experience local artistry.

activities.title: Dinner at Nuba Waidi Resturant&Cafe
activities.description: Conclude your day with a delightful dinner at Nuba Waidi Resturant&cafe, praised for its local and international cuisine.

itinerary.day: Day 3: December 9, 2026 - Nubian Heritage & Scenic Views

activities.title: Ascending to the Dome of Abu Al-Hawa
activities.description: Start your day on the West Bank with a visit to the Dome of Abu Al-Hawa, offering panoramic views of Aswan and the Nile, ideal for photography.

activities.title: Experiencing Nubian Eco Village
activities.description: Immerse yourselves in the authentic Nubian culture at the Nubian Eco Village, a chance to see traditional life and enjoy a serene environment.

activities.title: Lunch at Nubian Family Restaurant & Caffe at Rooftop
activities.description: Cross back to the East Bank for a charming lunch at Nubian Family Restaurant & Caffe, boasting rooftop views and delicious cafe fare.

activities.title: Discovering كلابشه الجديده
activities.description: Explore the area of كلابشه الجديده, a cultural site offering insights into local history and architecture.

activities.title: Historic Fatimid Cemetery
activities.description: Visit the Fatimid Cemetery, an ancient burial ground providing a quiet space for reflection and a peek into Aswan's past.

activities.title: Viewing Replica of Nabta Playa
activities.description: Discover the Replica of Nabta Playa, an intriguing reconstruction that reflects ancient astronomical and architectural knowledge.

activities.title: Dinner at Panorama Restaurant & Bar
activities.description: Enjoy an evening meal at Panorama Restaurant & Bar, offering stunning views alongside its local and international menu.

activities.title: Insight into Nubian Culture at Nubian Museum
activities.description: Begin your final day at the acclaimed Nubian Museum, offering a comprehensive look at Nubian civilization, history, and art.

activities.title: Ancient Wonders at Temple of Khnum
activities.description: Visit the Temple of Khnum, an ancient Egyptian temple dedicated to the ram-headed god Khnum, offering impressive architecture and history.

activities.title: Lunch at Saraya
activities.description: Enjoy a final lunch in Aswan at Saraya, revisiting a local favorite for its local and international cuisine.

activities.title: Nile Felucca & Dahabiya Tours with EgyptDiscovering
activities.description: Experience the timeless beauty of the Nile with a traditional Felucca or Dahabiya tour. This offers fantastic photography opportunities and a chance to enjoy the river, possibly including a camel riding experience on the banks.

activities.title: Cemetery Fatimid 2 Exploration
activities.description: Explore Cemetery Fatimid 2, another historical burial site that adds to Aswan's rich tapestry of cultural landmarks.

activities.title: The Engineering Marvel of Assuão-The High Dam
activities.description: Witness the grandeur of Assuão-The High Dam, a modern engineering feat that significantly impacted Egypt's agriculture and economy. A significant site for understanding contemporary Egypt.

activities.title: Farewell Dinner at Oriental Kebabgy
activities.description: Enjoy your farewell dinner at Oriental Kebabgy, known for its delicious local and international flavors.

budget_breakdown: Accommodation: EGP 3600 (3 nights at Old Cataract, Aswan)
Activities: EGP 4000 (20 attractions x EGP 200 average cost)
Food: EGP 2000 (8 meals x EGP 250 average cost)
